mainEntity.name: In LA, can courts sanction for AI-generated fake cases like NY?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, CA follows Rule 11; fake AI risks sanctions.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, California courts mirror federal Rule 11 sanctions for bad faith filings. NY Levidow precedent influences nationwide.[1] Key factors: unverified AI, harm caused. Expect similar fines, orders. Implement CA-specific AI ethics checks.
